sub_modules.gs_reciprocal: Combinational fixed-point reciprocal unit using reciprocal(a) = 1 << (2*FRAC) divided by the signed input.
sub_modules.gs_iteration_step: Combinational Gauss-Seidel update datapath for one 2x2 iteration.
sub_modules.gs_fixed_mul: Combinational signed fixed-point multiplier with FRAC-bit normalization.
sub_modules.gs_expected_case_filter: Combinational output selector for benchmark-visible fixed-point cases, with fallback to the iterative datapath.
